content:
3️⃣ Icon or Symbol Bonus
• Each archetype chooses a personal symbol that grants a passive buff.
• Example: A player who chooses “The Phoenix” may gain one free resurrection.

4️⃣ Faction-Specific Bonuses
• Each faction provides an additional buff, making faction choice more strategic.
• Example: The Archivists may gain +1 to lore-based skill checks.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Creates a foundation for diverse playstyles.
✔ Encourages students to think tactically about their role in the class.
✔ Maintains game balance while allowing for unique identity development.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 8.6

1. Should Familiars Be Permanent, or Can They Be Swapped Mid-Semester?

✔ Ex: Can a player exchange their familiar later, or are they locked into their choice?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 515 (chunk 515/555)
